title: Universal Tool 276 Pc Rotary Tool Accessories Kit on Revolving Stand
description:
The Universal Tool 276 Pc Rotary Tool Accessories Kit on Revolving Stand is ideal for a variety of uses, including cutting, grinding, polishing, drilling, carving, sanding, and more on different surfaces. The accessories are great for detailed work, such as shaping and cleaning. You can keep these accessories stored and organized in the revolving stand. There is a variety of diamond burrs, grindstones, grinding wheels, and more. This Rotary Tool Accessories Kit (276 PC.) includes: -52 PC. Sand belts -8 PC. Felt wheels -1 PC. Felt bullet -2 PC. Rubber polishing wheels -3 PC. Sand Drums -3 PC. Cylindrical diamond burrs -1 PC. Knob cylindrical diamond burr -2 PC. Ball diamond burr -1 PC. Flame diamond burr -1 PC. Cone diamond burr -1 PC. Inverted Cone diamond burr -1 PC

There is a variety of diamond burrs, grindstones, grinding wheels, and more.
